title: National Energy Policy
issuer: Energy Commission of Nigeria / The Presidency
key_promises: Privatisation of electricity and oil downstream

consumer_reality.electricity: Available capacity fell further after 2003. Generator dependency entrenched.
consumer_reality.gas_flaring: 2008 deadline missed. Flaring continued at scale past 2015.
consumer_reality.rural_energy: REF barely funded for a decade. Rural solar rollout began ~2015.
consumer_reality.refineries: All four refineries dysfunctional by mid-2000s. Fuel imports dominated until 2023.
consumer_reality.fuelwood: Still 50%+ of energy use. No mass stove or credit programme followed.
consumer_reality.privatisation: EPSRA 2005 passed. PHCN unbundled 2013. Partial progress.

notable_finding: The 2008 gas flaring deadline appears six times in the document across policies, objectives, and implementation schedules — and was missed completely.
